site.title: Composio Documentation
site.description: Platform powering 1000+ toolkits for AI agent tool integration

absence_patterns: No Claude Code skill integration documented despite skills.sh presence
No pricing or rate limit information
No comparison to building custom MCP servers
key_claims: Meta-tool architecture avoids loading 1000+ definitions into context
5-server MCP setup consumes ~55K tokens before conversation starts
Native tools give precise context control; MCP gives simplicity
Session-scoped state preserves context across meta-tool calls
Remote workbench provides persistent sandboxed execution for agents
